{{Quote|Aleas Rans'ery handles anything that deals with the Bright Jewel Ribbon Quadrant. It concerns the defensive assignments for our pilots.|[[Laetin A'shera]], to a Car'das pilot|<ref name="SWG:AtA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Assassinating the Assassin|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>}}
'''Aleas Rans'ery''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|So... ya think yer ready for the Bright Jewel Ribbon Quadrant, hm? I'll believe it when I see it. Ya don't look like pilot material t'me.|Aleas Rans'ery, to a Car'das pilot|<ref name="SWG:PBJR" />}}
Aleas Rans'ery was a well-trained pilot for the [[Car'das/Legends|Car'das]] based on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], along with [[Serissu]], [[Laetin A'shera]] and [[Dartas Pytin]].<ref name="SWG:PBJR" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> she oversaw all Car'das operations in the [[Bright Jewel Ribbon]] quadrant of the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:PBJR" />

During the [[Battle of Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Battle of Tansarii Point Station]] between Car'das and [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] forces, Aleas Rans'ery dispatched pilots to attacks Black Sun ships in the area.<ref name="SWG:PBJR" /> During the battle, Rans'ery also tasked the Kallor brothers [[Sulale Kallor|Sulale]] and [[Waris Kallor|Waris]] to scout enemy territory and find weaknesses in the [[Salient Trinity]] bases. The brothers succeed in their mission but were attacked by Black Sun starfighters in the Bright Jewel Ribbon. Car'das starfighters dispatched by Rans'ery finally rescued the brothers.<ref name="SWG:KBR">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Kallor Brothers Rescue|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> Rans'ery's pilots later rescued [[Executive officer/Legends|First Officer]] [[Atris (officer)|Atris]] of the [[Dynath Miners]] from Black Sun attacks.<ref name="SWG:BSA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Black Sun Attacks|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref> Aleas Rans'ery eventually tasked her pilots to eliminate the [[Ace/Legends|ace]] and Black Sun hero [[Arlem Demonhunter]].<ref name="SWG:CA">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Counter Attack|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Aleas Rans'ery appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:PBJR" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Aleas Rans'ery was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:PBJR" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref>
